changes.description: Added a 'ZIP' button to the History Sidebar to quickly download an entire batch of generated voices as a single compressed ZIP file.
Refined audio file naming logic across individual and batch downloads to intelligently use the first 30 characters of the generation text combined with the speaker name.
Redesigned the History Sidebar batch action buttons into compact, icon-only squares with tooltips to perfectly prevent visual overflow in narrow screen layouts.
Fixed a UI flexbox layout anomaly where the 'Delete Saved Profile' button improperly expanded to fill the container width.
Added Audio Streaming (Time-to-First-Byte) for instant playback of generated sentences.
Added Advanced Audio FX Panel with Studio Quality Presets (EQ, Reverb, Denoise).
Added Batch Generation Mode with collapsible folder grouping in the History Sidebar.
Added persistent local storage using IndexedDB to save audio history across browser restarts.
Added real-time CPU and RAM telemetry badges to the generated audio history cards.
Built a 'Saved Profiles' system to persist favorite Custom Voice combinations directly to localStorage.
Created a 'Merge & Download Batch' tool that seamlessly concatenates batch generations into a single continuous WAV file.
Integrated an Aurora-themed real-time reactive Audio Waveform visualizer driven by the Web Audio API.
Changed PyTorch model dtype to bfloat16 to cut memory footprint in half and significantly increase generation speed.
Completely removed the INT8 Quantization 'Low RAM Mode' toggle after identifying its severe performance penalty.
Completely refactored Batch Generation architecture from backend background tasks to a frontend async loop, providing live generation progress feedback in the UI.
Implemented intelligent sentence-level text chunking for reliable long-form TTS generation.
Refined the Studio Quality FX preset to a gentler mastering chain for a more natural AI voice.
Replaced timestamp-based Batch IDs with clean 6-character random hex strings and elegantly parsed legacy unix timestamps.
Redesigned History Sidebar batch folders with distinct inset grouping and threaded indentation for better visual hierarchy.
Polished the entire layout to a strict single-screen UI architecture by disabling global scrolling and introducing custom sleek global webkit scrollbars.
Re-engineered the estimated time-to-completion algorithm with a dynamic multiplier that recalculates based on the processing overhead of the selected output codec (WAV vs FLAC vs OGG).
Fixed a fatal backend crash that occurred when activating the Studio Quality Audio Preset.
Patched severe OS freezing during backend startup by disabling Hugging Face accelerate and streaming weights directly to RAM.
Fixed a rogue React empty src warning that caused the browser to redundantly download the root webpage.
Fixed a fatal 'echoing/repeating' audio artifact in Voice Clone mode by disabling backend chunking, allowing a single seamless generation without repeated reference audio bleeding.
Tied the Aurora Audio Visualizer rendering to a strict `isPlaying` state monitor hooked directly into the AudioQueue to prevent empty boxes from persisting on screen.
Fixed UI bug where the Advanced FX button appeared broken while the Studio Quality Preset was enabled, by dynamically disabling it.
Initial release of QTS-app dashboard featuring Custom Voice and Voice Clone modes.
Added Personal Voice Library to permanently save and instantly load custom voice characters.
Added 'Instant Clone' (x-vector only) mode to bypass reference text transcription.
Added automatic language selection when choosing a preset character.
Massive full-stack performance optimization utilizing React.memo and FastAPI routers, achieving peak CPU efficiency.
Redesigned UI aesthetic to 'Obsidian & Silk', a lightweight minimal theme replacing heavy graphics with fast, satisfying micro-animations.
Added ability to delete audio items directly from the History Sidebar.
